message:
🌱 Add cri-o: Container output not being logged with CRI format when mission (#1597)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cri-o-4029-container-output-not-being-logged-with-cri-format-when-using-runtime-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cri-o: Container output not being logged with CRI format when using runtime_type=vm",
+    "description": "Container output not being logged with CRI format when using runtime_type=vm. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cri-o deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cri-o version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o
helm list -n cri-o 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working cri-o installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cri-o configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cri-o configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o
kubectl get configmap -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cri-o
```
**Description**

Logs from a container launched with `runtime_type=vm` (e.g. Kata, using the containerd shim) aren't formatted correctly. They're completely missing the CRI formatting (timestamp and stream)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Container output not being logged with CRI format when…",
+        "description": "ze" : "1G",
        "numjobs" : "1",
        "runtime" : "60s",
        "fallocate" : "none",
        "invalidate" : "1"
      },
...
```

Although this is exactly what we'd expect as the output of `kubectl logs $pod`, the format in question will lead to the following error:
`failed to get parse
```yaml
vmss-agent-kata1-test-rmuuc000000 ~ # crio --version
crio version 1.17.4
commit: "39c8cdc95bc9f70635d756a3001416e7a3ceb1e1"
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade cri-o to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade cri-o:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade cri-o cri-o/cri-o --namespace cri-o
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cri-o
helm list -n cri-o
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o
kubectl get events -n cri-o --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Container output not being logged with CRI format when…" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "ze" : "1G",
        "numjobs" : "1",
        "runtime" : "60s",
        "fallocate" : "none",
        "invalidate" : "1"
      },
...
```

Although this is exactly what we'd expect as the output of `kubectl logs $pod`, the format in question will lead to the following error:
`failed to get parse function: unsupported log format: "{\n"`

After",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "vmss-agent-kata1-test-rmuuc000000 ~ # crio --version
crio version 1.17.4
commit: "39c8cdc95bc9f70635d756a3001416e7a3ceb1e1"",
+        "[root@k8s cri-o]# cat /var/log/pods/default_fio-test_855d9cec-2b0f-42d2-bbe5-cce769cb7b10/fio/0.log
{
  "fio version" : "fio-2.17-45-g06cb",
  "timestamp" : 1597428680,
  "timestamp_ms" : 1597428680853,
  "time" : "Fri Aug 14 18:11:20 2020",
  "jobs" : [
    {
      "jobname" : "random-writers-emptydir",
      "groupid" : 0,
      "error" : 0,
      "eta" : 0,

        "size" : "1G",
        "numjobs" : "1",
        "runtime" : "60s",
        "fallocate" : "none",
        "invalidate" : "1"
      },
...",

2020-"
